uplink.description: Full uplink: battery, onboard temperature + humidity, outputs, digital/analog/pulse inputs, MCU temp
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload covering every fPort-10 channel/type the codec recognizes. battery 0x0168=360*0.01=3.6 V; temp 0x00EB=235*0.1=23.5 C; rh 0x5A=90*0.5=45 %; input_2 0x2EE0=12000*1e-6=0.012 A (12 mA in the 4-20 mA band); input_3 0x0CE4=3300*0.001=3.3 V; pulse 0x04D2=1234; mcu 0x012C=300*0.1=30 C. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (raw decode) and normalizing per the mapping notes.

uplink.description: Climate-only uplink: battery + onboard air temperature and humidity
uplink._note: Synthetic minimal climate payload. Matches the temperature/relative_humidity values the upstream decoder produces for the same bytes.
Synthetic two's-complement check: temp 0xFFCE=-50*0.1=-5.0 C; rh 0x64=100*0.5=50 %. Upstream decoder yields temperature -5, relative_humidity 50 for these bytes.

uplink.description: TTN example: Output 1 and 2 change-state uplink
uplink._note: Input is the upstream t00056xx-codec.yaml example. Upstream emits change_output_states.output1=0, output2=1; normalized here to the extras outputState1/outputState2 (no climate keys present, so this is a supporting vector).

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort (configuration/diagnostic port, not measurement data)
uplink._note: fPort 100 is the register read-back port in the upstream decoder, not a measurement uplink; this codec only decodes data on fPort 10.

uplink.description: Unrecognized channel/type on the data port
uplink._note: 0xAB is not a defined channel on fPort 10. Upstream reports 'Couldn't find header ...'; this codec reports an unrecognized channel/type error.
